title: Image quantification
steps: Analyze GUV images using a custom script implemented in Python 3.6 ( https://github.com/Hurley-Lab/GUVquantification/blob/main/GUVintensity-2channel.ipynb ).
Define the outline of individual bead based on the bright field channel.
Calculate the intensity threshold by the average intensities of pixels inside and outside of the bead.
Obtain the average intensity measurements of individual bead.
Calculate the averages and standard deviations among the measured values per each condition.
creator: Chunmei Chang
